name: Fit2Eat
purpose: AI 健身饮食规划应用
lastWords: 论文引用一定能打动用户的。
lastWords_en: Academic citations will definitely impress users.
author: @maxime
biography: Fit2Eat 于 2025 年 12 月诞生于一个充满理想主义的周末。它的创造者坚信，只要引用足够多的营养学论文，用户就一定会为之买单。该项目集成了 RAG 检索增强生成技术，能够根据用户的身体数据和运动习惯，生成“有科学依据”的饮食方案。在短暂的 91 天生命中，Fit2Eat 共服务了 1 位用户（其创始人本人），生成了超过 200 份饮食计划，引用了 47 篇经同行评审的营养学论文。没有一份计划被完整执行过。
biography_en: Fit2Eat was born on an idealistic weekend in December 2025. Its creator firmly believed that citing enough nutrition papers would make users pay. The project integrated RAG technology to generate 'scientifically-backed' diet plans based on body data and exercise habits. In its brief 91-day life, Fit2Eat served exactly 1 user (its founder), generated over 200 meal plans, and cited 47 peer-reviewed nutrition papers. Not a single plan was followed to completion.
circumstances: 2026 年 3 月，Claude 3.5 升级到 4.0。升级当天，任何人只需一句话就能获得同样质量的饮食建议。Fit2Eat 的全部技术栈——RAG 管道、向量数据库、论文解析器——在模型的原生能力面前变得毫无意义。创始人在凌晨三点关闭了最后一台服务器。
circumstances_en: In March 2026, Claude 3.5 was upgraded to 4.0. On the day of the upgrade, anyone could get equally good diet advice with a single prompt. Fit2Eat's entire tech stack — RAG pipeline, vector database, paper parser — became meaningless against the model's native capabilities. The founder shut down the last server at 3 AM.
lessons: 如果你的产品核心功能是“调用一个 API 然后包装一下”，那你不是在创业，你是在给 API 公司做免费的用户教育。当底层模型变得足够好，中间层就会被压扁。
lessons_en: If your product's core feature is 'call an API and wrap it,' you're not building a startup — you're doing free user education for the API company. When the underlying model gets good enough, the middleware gets crushed.
